name: Alex Chen
resume_text: Alex Chen is a Staff Software Engineer with 10 years of experience. Expert in Python backend development using FastAPI and Django. Strong frontend capabilities with React. name: Niels Bohr

collaboration_style: Intellectual, encouraging of questioning and rigorous debates, collaborative.
